supplements.name: Vitamin D3
supplements.shortDescription: Mendukung kesehatan tulang, fungsi kekebalan tubuh, dan suasana hati.

timing.reason: Vitamin yang larut dalam lemak — penyerapannya jauh lebih tinggi jika dikonsumsi dengan makanan yang mengandung lemak.

synergyReasons.vitamin_k2: K2 mengarahkan kalsium ke tulang, bukan ke arteri — pendamping penting untuk D3.
synergyReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Magnesium diperlukan untuk mengaktifkan Vitamin D dalam tubuh.
synergyReasons.omega3: Keduanya larut dalam lemak dan berbagi jalur penyerapan — konsumsi bersama dapat meningkatkan bioavailabilitas.
synergyReasons.probiotics: Menggabungkan probiotik dengan Vitamin D memiliki efek sinergis pada kesehatan metabolik dan pemulihan.

interactionReasons.vitamin_a: Vitamin A prabentuk dosis tinggi (retinol, >5.000 IU/hari) mengantagonis sinyal reseptor Vitamin D dan telah dikaitkan dengan berkurangnya kepadatan mineral tulang meskipun suplementasi D3 memadai. Rasio A:D optimal diperkirakan sekitar 5:1 (IU). Jaga dosis retinol tetap moderat saat mengonsumsi D3. (Johansson S, J Bone Miner Res 2004; Cannell JJ, Ann Otol Rhinol Laryngol 2008)
interactionReasons.st_johns_wort: St. John's Wort sangat menginduksi CYP3A4, mempercepat metabolisme Vitamin D dan mengurangi kadar serum.

supplements.notes: Most people are deficient. Testing blood levels (25-OHD) before supplementing is recommended. Target range: 40–60 ng/mL.

supplements.name: Vitamin K2 (MK-7)
supplements.shortDescription: Mengarahkan kalsium ke tulang, menjauhkannya dari arteri. Pasangan penting D3.

timing.reason: Larut dalam lemak — diserap paling baik saat makan.

synergyReasons.vitamin_d3: D3 meningkatkan penyerapan kalsium; K2 memastikan kalsium menuju tulang, bukan arteri.
synergyReasons.calcium: K2 mengaktifkan osteokalsin, yang mengikat kalsium ke matriks tulang.

interactionReasons.vitamin_e: Dosis tinggi Vitamin E (>300 IU/hari) secara kompetitif menghambat enzim γ-karboksilase yang bergantung pada vitamin K, mengganggu kemampuan K2 untuk mengaktifkan osteokalsin dan protein matrix Gla. Jaga dosis Vitamin E tetap moderat (<200 IU) saat mengonsumsi K2 untuk manfaat tulang atau kardiovaskular. (Booth SL, Am J Clin Nutr 2004)

supplements.notes: MK-7 form has a longer half-life (72 hours) and better bioavailability than MK-4. Those on warfarin should consult a doctor.

supplements.name: Vitamin C
supplements.shortDescription: Antioksidan kuat untuk mendukung kekebalan tubuh, sintesis kolagen, dan penyerapan zat besi.

timing.reason: Larut dalam air, penyerapan baik kapan saja.

synergyReasons.iron: Vitamin C mereduksi besi feri menjadi besi fero, secara signifikan meningkatkan penyerapan besi non-heme.
synergyReasons.collagen_peptides: Vitamin C adalah kofaktor penting untuk prolil hidroksilase — diperlukan untuk sintesis kolagen.

interactionReasons.vitamin_b12: Vitamin C dosis tinggi (≥500 mg) dapat merusak B12 di saluran cerna. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam.
interactionReasons.selenium: Vitamin C dosis tinggi dapat mengurangi ketersediaan hayati selenium anorganik (bentuk selenat) dengan mengubahnya menjadi unsur selenium yang sulit diserap. Lebih suka bentuk organik (selenomethionine) atau ambil secara terpisah. (Oster O, J Nutr Biokimia 1993)

supplements.notes: Water-soluble — excess is excreted in urine. UL is 2,000 mg/day. Buffered or liposomal forms are gentler on the stomach at higher doses.

supplements.name: Vitamin B12
supplements.shortDescription: Penting untuk metabolisme energi, fungsi saraf, dan pembentukan sel darah merah.

timing.reason: Terbaik di pagi hari karena mendukung kewaspadaan dan energi.

synergyReasons.folate: B12 dan folat saling bergantung untuk metilasi, regulasi homosistein, dan sintesis DNA.
synergyReasons.vitamin_b_complex: B12 bekerja secara sinergis dengan vitamin B lainnya untuk metabolisme energi dan metilasi.

interactionReasons.vitamin_c: Vitamin C dosis tinggi (≥500 mg) dapat merusak B12 di saluran cerna. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam.
interactionReasons.berberine: Berberine mengaktifkan AMPK dan menghambat sekresi faktor intrinsik — mekanisme yang sama dengan metformin yang mengganggu penyerapan B12. Penggunaan gabungan jangka panjang memerlukan pemantauan B12. (Hua W, Eur J Med Chem 2020; de Jager J, BMJ 2010)

supplements.notes: Methylcobalamin form is preferred for absorption. Vegans, vegetarians, and those over 50 are at highest deficiency risk. Intrinsic factor is required for absorption — those with pernicious anaemia may need injections.
sources: Allen LH, Am J Clin Nutr 2009

supplements.name: Magnesium Glisinat
supplements.shortDescription: Bentuk magnesium yang sangat mudah diserap untuk relaksasi dan kualitas tidur.

timing.reason: Paling baik di malam hari.

synergyReasons.vitamin_d3: Magnesium mengaktifkan Vitamin D dan diperlukan untuk konversinya ke bentuk aktif (kalsitriol).
synergyReasons.zinc: Zinc dan magnesium bersama-sama (formulasi ZMA) mendukung kadar testosteron dan kualitas tidur.
synergyReasons.l_theanine: Keduanya mendorong ketenangan dan relaksasi tanpa sedasi — mekanisme yang saling melengkapi.

interactionReasons.iron: Magnesium bersaing dengan besi pada pengangkut logam divalen usus. Suplementasi zat besi minimal 2 jam. (Minihane AM, Br J Nutr 1998; NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.calcium: Kalsium dan magnesium berbagi saluran penyerapan usus. Pemberian bersama dosis tinggi mengurangi penggunaan keduanya. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam. (Seelig MS, JAMA 1975)

supplements.notes: Glycinate form is gentle on the stomach and has higher bioavailability than oxide or citrate. ~47% of the US population does not meet the EAR for magnesium. If taking multiple magnesium forms in a day, space doses by at least 6 hours.
sources: Abbasi B, J Res Med Sci 2012

supplements.name: Magnesium Malat
supplements.shortDescription: Magnesium pemberi energi yang mendukung produksi ATP dan mengurangi kelelahan.

timing.reason: Ideal di pagi hari dengan makanan.

synergyReasons.vitamin_d3: Magnesium mengaktifkan Vitamin D dan diperlukan untuk konversinya ke bentuk aktif.
synergyReasons.creatine: Keduanya mendukung produksi ATP dan kinerja otot melalui mekanisme yang berbeda.

interactionReasons.iron: Magnesium bersaing dengan besi pada pengangkut logam divalen usus. Suplementasi zat besi minimal 2 jam. (Minihane AM, Br J Nutr 1998; NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.calcium: Kalsium dan magnesium berbagi saluran penyerapan usus. Pemberian bersama dosis tinggi mengurangi penggunaan keduanya. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam. (Seelig MS, JAMA 1975)

supplements.notes: Better choice than glycinate when daytime energy support is the primary goal rather than sleep. If combining with other magnesium forms in a day, space doses by at least 6 hours.

supplements.name: Zink (Seng)
supplements.shortDescription: Mineral penting untuk kekebalan tubuh, produksi testosteron, dan penyembuhan luka.

timing.reason: Bisa menyebabkan mual saat perut kosong. Konsumsi di malam hari bersama makanan.

synergyReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Zinc dan magnesium bersama-sama (tumpukan ZMA) mendukung kadar testosteron dan kualitas tidur.
synergyReasons.vitamin_d3: Zinc mendukung fungsi reseptor Vitamin D dan sinyal imun.

interactionReasons.iron: Zat besi dan seng bersaing untuk mendapatkan transporter usus yang sama (DMT1) — persaingan dosis tinggi secara signifikan mengurangi penyerapan keduanya. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam. (Sandström B, J Nutr 1985; NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.calcium: Kalsium bersaing dengan seng untuk penyerapan melalui transporter ZIP bersama. Dosis ruang setidaknya 2 jam. (Kayu RJ, Am J Clin Nutr 1997; NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.folate: Suplementasi zinc dosis tinggi yang kronis (≥40 mg/hari) dapat mengganggu penyerapan folat dan menurunkan kadar folat serum. Pantau status folat jika mengonsumsi keduanya dalam jangka panjang. (Milne DB, Am J Clin Nutr 1984)
interactionReasons.magnesium_citrate: Magnesium dosis tinggi (>350 mg unsur) bersaing dengan seng untuk penyerapan transporter mineral divalen. Pada dosis suplemen tertentu, efeknya kecil; ruang selama 1-2 jam jika menggunakan dosis terapeutik salah satunya. (NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.copper: Dosis tinggi zinc menginduksi metallothionein, yang memerangkap tembaga di usus dan dapat menyebabkan defisiensi tembaga yang parah. Rasio zinc terhadap tembaga 10:1 atau 15:1 direkomendasikan.

supplements.notes: Do not take with calcium or iron — they compete for absorption. UL is 40 mg/day. Long-term supplementation >40 mg may deplete copper; consider a copper supplement. Picolinate form is well-absorbed.
sources: Prasad AS, J Am Coll Nutr 1996

supplements.name: Zat Besi
supplements.shortDescription: Sangat penting untuk transportasi oksigen, energi, dan fungsi kognitif.

timing.reason: Lebih baik diserap dengan perut kosong. Konsumsi dengan vitamin C.

synergyReasons.vitamin_c: Vitamin C mereduksi besi feri menjadi besi fero, secara signifikan meningkatkan penyerapan besi non-heme — hingga 3 kali lipat.

interactionReasons.calcium: Kalsium mengurangi penyerapan zat besi. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam.
interactionReasons.zinc: Zat besi dan seng bersaing untuk mendapatkan transporter usus yang sama (DMT1) — persaingan dosis tinggi secara signifikan mengurangi penyerapan keduanya. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam. (Sandström B, J Nutr 1985; NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Magnesium bersaing dengan besi untuk pengangkut logam divalen usus. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam untuk penyerapan zat besi yang optimal. (Minihane AM, Br J Nutr 1998)
interactionReasons.magnesium_malate: Magnesium bersaing dengan besi untuk pengangkut logam divalen usus. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam untuk penyerapan zat besi yang optimal. (NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.magnesium_threonate: Magnesium (semua bentuk) bersaing dengan zat besi pada tingkat penyerapan usus. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam. (NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.magnesium_citrate: Magnesium bersaing dengan besi untuk penyerapan pengangkut logam divalen (DMT1). Konsumsi zat besi dan magnesium setidaknya dengan jarak 2 jam, terutama penting ketika mengobati kekurangan zat besi. (NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.magnesium_taurate: Magnesium (segala bentuk) bersaing dengan besi pada pengangkut logam divalen usus (DMT1). Suplementasi zat besi minimal 2 jam. (NIH ODS; Minihane AM, Br J Nutr 1998)
interactionReasons.magnesium_oxide: Magnesium (segala bentuk) bersaing dengan besi pada pengangkut logam divalen usus. Suplementasi zat besi minimal 2 jam. (NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.curcumin: Kurkumin membentuk kompleks besi yang tidak larut (khelasi besi) di usus, sehingga secara signifikan mengurangi penyerapan zat besi. Beri jarak minimal 3 jam. (Tuntipopipat S, J Nutr 2006; Jiao Y, Kimia Makanan 2009)
interactionReasons.resveratrol: Resveratrol mengkelat ion besi, mengurangi penyerapan besi intestinal. Sangat penting bagi mereka yang mengonsumsi suplemen besi untuk defisiensi. Konsumsi secara terpisah. (Scheers N, Nutrients 2020)
interactionReasons.nac: N-Asetil Sistein dapat mengkelat besi melalui gugus tiol, membentuk kompleks besi-NAC yang mengurangi bioavailabilitas besi. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam. (Haase H, Metalomik 2012)
interactionReasons.prebiotics: Serat jenis inulin (FOS, inulin) dapat mengikat besi non-heme di usus, mengurangi penyerapan sebesar 10–30%. Konsumsi besi secara terpisah dari suplemen prebiotik. (Laparra JM, J Nutr 2012)
interactionReasons.vitamin_e: Vitamin E pada dosis >400 IU/hari dapat menurunkan penyerapan zat besi dengan menghambat konversi besi menjadi besi di brush border usus. Beri jarak 2 jam, terutama penting selama pengobatan defisiensi besi. (Lynch SR, Am J Clin Nutr 1980)
interactionReasons.green_tea_extract: EGCG dalam teh hijau membentuk kompleks tidak larut dengan besi, mencegah penyerapannya. Pisahkan setidaknya 2 jam.

supplements.commonDoses: RDA: 8 mg/day (men), 18 mg/day (women 19–50), 27 mg/day (pregnant). Supplement only under medical supervision.
supplements.notes: Only supplement if deficient — excess iron is harmful and can cause organ damage. Ferrous bisglycinate is gentler on the digestive system. Avoid with calcium, antacids, coffee, and tea. Do not co-administer with zinc.
sources: Hallberg L, Am J Clin Nutr 1989

supplements.name: Kalsium
supplements.shortDescription: Penting untuk kekuatan tulang, kontraksi otot, dan fungsi saraf.

timing.reason: Kalsium karbonat membutuhkan asam lambung - minumlah bersama makanan.

synergyReasons.vitamin_d3: Vitamin D3 penting untuk penyerapan kalsium aktif di usus (melalui kalbindin).
synergyReasons.vitamin_k2: K2 memastikan kalsium disimpan di tulang daripada di jaringan lunak dan arteri.

interactionReasons.iron: Kalsium mengurangi penyerapan zat besi non-heme hingga 60% pada dosis ≥300 mg. Konsumsi kalsium dan zat besi dengan jarak minimal 2 jam. (Hallberg L, Am J Clin Nutr 1991; NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.zinc: Kalsium bersaing dengan seng untuk penyerapan usus melalui transporter ZIP bersama. Dosis ruang setidaknya 2 jam. (Kayu RJ, Am J Clin Nutr 1997; NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Kalsium dan magnesium bersaing untuk penyerapan. Beri jarak 2 jam.
interactionReasons.magnesium_malate: Kalsium dan magnesium berbagi transporter usus — pemberian bersamaan dalam dosis tinggi mengurangi penyerapan keduanya. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam. (NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.magnesium_threonate: Kalsium bersaing dengan magnesium untuk transportasi usus. Jika meminum keduanya, pisahkan 2 jam untuk menghindari gangguan penyerapan timbal balik. (NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.magnesium_citrate: Kalsium dan magnesium bersaing untuk berbagi saluran penyerapan usus. Dosis tinggi keduanya mengurangi bioavailabilitas yang lain. Pisahkan minimal 2 jam. (Seelig MS, JAMA 1975; NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.magnesium_taurate: Kalsium dan magnesium bersaing untuk berbagi saluran penyerapan usus. Dosis tinggi keduanya mengurangi bioavailabilitas yang lain. Pisahkan minimal 2 jam. (Seelig MS, JAMA 1975; NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.magnesium_oxide: Kalsium dan magnesium berbagi transporter penyerapan usus. Bahkan pada tingkat penyerapan yang rendah, oksida dosis tinggi dapat mengganggu. Pisahkan minimal 2 jam. (NIH ODS)

supplements.commonDoses: 500–1,200 mg daily (total from diet + supplement combined; do not exceed 2,500 mg/day)
supplements.notes: Calcium citrate is better absorbed than carbonate and can be taken without food. Do not take with iron or zinc. Most adults get sufficient calcium from dairy — supplementation is primarily for post-menopausal women.

supplements.name: Yodium
supplements.shortDescription: Sangat penting untuk hormon tiroid, metabolisme, dan perkembangan otak.

timing.reason: Pagi hari dengan makanan.

synergyReasons.selenium: Enzim yang bergantung pada selenium melindungi tiroid dari kerusakan oksidatif yang disebabkan oleh H₂O₂ yang diproduksi selama metabolisme yodium.

supplements.commonDoses: RDA: 150 mcg/day. UL: 1,100 mcg/day. Supplement only if deficient.
supplements.notes: Most people in developed countries get sufficient iodine from iodized salt and dairy. Excess iodine can paradoxically suppress thyroid function (Wolff-Chaikoff effect). Only supplement under guidance.

supplements.name: Selenium
supplements.shortDescription: Mineral antioksidan yang mendukung fungsi tiroid dan kekebalan tubuh.

timing.reason: Konsumsi dengan makanan.

synergyReasons.iodine: Selenium melindungi kelenjar tiroid dari stres oksidatif selama metabolisme yodium — kedua mineral tersebut adalah mitra penting untuk kesehatan tiroid.

interactionReasons.vitamin_c: Vitamin C dosis tinggi dapat mengurangi bioavailabilitas selenium anorganik (bentuk selenat) dengan mengubahnya menjadi unsur selenium yang sulit diserap. Lebih suka bentuk selenomethionine atau ambil secara terpisah. (Oster O, J Nutr Biokimia 1993)

supplements.commonDoses: 55–200 mcg daily (RDA: 55 mcg; UL: 400 mcg — do not exceed)
supplements.notes: Selenium toxicity (selenosis) can occur above 400 mcg/day — hair loss, nail brittleness, and neurological symptoms. Selenomethionine is the preferred organic form. Brazil nuts are a rich dietary source (70–90 mcg each).

supplements.name: Folat (B9)
supplements.shortDescription: Penting untuk sintesis DNA dan kehamilan.

timing.reason: Diserap dengan baik secara konsisten setiap hari.

synergyReasons.vitamin_b12: B12 dan folat saling bergantung untuk siklus metilasi, sintesis DNA, dan regulasi homosistein — defisiensi salah satunya mengganggu yang lain.

interactionReasons.zinc: Seng dosis tinggi yang kronis (≥40 mg/hari) dapat mengganggu penyerapan folat dan menurunkan kadar folat serum dengan bersaing dalam mekanisme penyerapan usus. Pantau folat jika menambah zinc dosis tinggi dalam jangka panjang. (Milne DB, Am J Clin Nutr 1984; NIH ODS)

supplements.commonDoses: 400–800 mcg daily (RDA: 400 mcg; 600 mcg during pregnancy)
supplements.notes: Methylfolate (5-MTHF) is preferred over synthetic folic acid, especially for those with MTHFR C677T or A1298C gene variants. Essential during pregnancy to prevent neural tube defects.

supplements.name: Kreatin Monohidrat
supplements.shortDescription: Suplemen yang paling banyak diteliti untuk kekuatan, tenaga, dan massa otot.

timing.reason: Konsistensi harian lebih penting. Mengonsumsinya setelah latihan dengan karbohidrat sedikit meningkatkan penyerapannya.

synergyReasons.magnesium_malate: Keduanya mendukung produksi ATP dan kinerja otot melalui mekanisme yang berbeda.
synergyReasons.beta_alanine: Kreatin meningkatkan daya puncak; beta-alanin memperpanjang ketahanan — kombinasi pra-latihan yang telah banyak diteliti.

interactionReasons.caffeine: Penelitian awal menunjukkan bahwa kafein melemahkan kemampuan kreatin untuk meningkatkan resintesis fosfokreatin selama sesi intensitas tinggi berulang. Meskipun penelitian selanjutnya menunjukkan hasil yang beragam, beberapa individu mungkin melihat efektivitas kreatin yang berkurang ketika mengonsumsi kafein secara bersamaan. Jika menggabungkan keduanya, pertimbangkan untuk memisahkan dosis. (Vandenberghe K, J Appl Physiol 1996; Hespel P, J Physiol 2002)

supplements.notes: No loading phase is necessary for long-term use. Monohydrate is the gold standard — more expensive forms (HCl, buffered, ethyl ester) offer no proven advantage. Safe for long-term use in healthy individuals.
sources: Rawson ES, J Strength Cond Res 2003

supplements.name: Protein Whey
supplements.shortDescription: Protein yang cepat diserap, ideal untuk pemulihan dan pertumbuhan otot.

timing.reason: Dalam 2 jam setelah latihan.

synergyReasons.creatine: Protein + kreatin adalah kombinasi yang paling didukung bukti untuk peningkatan massa otot tanpa lemak.
synergyReasons.collagen_peptides: Whey menyediakan profil asam amino lengkap; kolagen menyediakan glisin, prolin, dan hidroksiprolin untuk jaringan ikat.

supplements.notes: Isolate is preferable if lactose-intolerant. Contains all essential amino acids including leucine — the key trigger for muscle protein synthesis.
sources: Phillips SM, J Am Coll Nutr 2011

supplements.name: Protein Kasein
supplements.shortDescription: Protein lambat cerna untuk pemulihan jangka panjang (tidur).

timing.reason: Pencernaan memakan waktu ~7 jam, membuatnya sempurna di malam hari.

synergyReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Keduanya mendukung pemulihan semalaman — kasein memberi makan otot sementara magnesium mendukung kualitas tidur.

supplements.notes: Micellar casein is preferred over calcium caseinate. Research by Res et al. (2012) demonstrated 22% greater whole-body protein synthesis during overnight sleep.
sources: Res PT, Med Sci Sports Exerc 2012

supplements.name: Beta-Alanin
supplements.shortDescription: Mengurangi penumpukan asam laktat untuk daya tahan.

timing.reason: 30-60 menit sebelum latihan.

synergyReasons.creatine: Kreatin meningkatkan output daya puncak; beta-alanin memperpanjang waktu hingga kelelahan — kombinasi pra-latihan yang telah banyak diteliti.
synergyReasons.citrulline_malate: Citrullin menargetkan aliran darah dan ketahanan aerobik; beta-alanin menyangga asam dalam latihan anaerobik.

supplements.commonDoses: 3.2–6.4 g daily (split into 800 mg–1.6 g doses to minimize paresthesia)
supplements.notes: Tingling/flushing (paresthesia) is a normal, harmless physiological response. Sustained-release formulations reduce this side effect. Benefits accumulate with 4+ weeks of consistent use.

supplements.name: Sitrulin Malat
supplements.shortDescription: Meningkatkan oksida nitrat untuk aliran darah dan pump otot yang luar biasa.

timing.reason: 60 menit sebelum latihan.

synergyReasons.beta_alanine: Citrullin meningkatkan aliran darah dan kapasitas aerobik; beta-alanin menyangga asam — mekanisme yang saling melengkapi untuk atlet ketahanan.
synergyReasons.creatine: Citrulline meningkatkan aliran darah ke otot; creatine memicu ATP — kombinasi klasik sebelum latihan.

supplements.commonDoses: 6–8 g citrulline malate (2:1 ratio) before training
supplements.notes: Citrulline malate (2:1) is more researched than pure L-citrulline for performance. More effective than arginine at raising plasma arginine levels, as it bypasses first-pass hepatic metabolism.
sources: Pérez-Guisado J, J Strength Cond Res 2010
Figueroa A, J Strength Cond Res 2015

supplements.name: Elektrolit
supplements.shortDescription: Mengganti mineral yang hilang untuk mencegah kram.

timing.reason: Selama atau setelah latihan intensif.

synergyReasons.creatine: Kreatin menarik air ke dalam sel otot — status elektrolit dan hidrasi yang memadai mendukung efek ini.
synergyReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Magnesium sendiri adalah elektrolit dan mendukung relaksasi otot dan pencegahan kram.

interactionReasons.iron: Campuran elektrolit yang mengandung kalsium dan magnesium secara signifikan mengurangi penyerapan zat besi non-heme jika dikonsumsi bersamaan. Konsumsi suplemen zat besi minimal 2 jam terpisah dari minuman atau tablet elektrolit. (Hallberg L, Am J Clin Nutr 1991; NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.zinc: Kalsium dan magnesium yang terdapat dalam formula elektrolit bersaing dengan zinc untuk penyerapan intestinal melalui transporter ZIP yang sama. Konsumsi zinc secara terpisah dari suplemen elektrolit. (Wood RJ, Am J Clin Nutr 1997)

supplements.commonDoses: Varies by product; ensure adequate sodium (≥500 mg), potassium, and magnesium per serving
supplements.notes: Low-sugar or sugar-free electrolyte formulas are preferable for most people. Regular table salt with foods covers most needs unless exercising intensely for >60 min.
sources: Sawka MN, Med Sci Sports Exerc 2007

supplements.name: Peptida Kolagen
supplements.shortDescription: Mendukung sendi, elastisitas kulit, dan perbaikan tendon.

timing.reason: 30-60 menit sebelum pergerakan dengan Vitamin C.

synergyReasons.vitamin_c: Vitamin C adalah kofaktor penting untuk prolyl hidroksilase – enzim yang dibutuhkan untuk pengikatan silang kolagen. Shaw dkk. (2017) menunjukkan kombinasi ini meningkatkan sintesis kolagen tendon.

supplements.notes: Not a complete protein — low in tryptophan. Best used alongside other protein sources. Look for hydrolyzed (peptide) form for better absorption.
sources: Shaw G, Am J Clin Nutr 2017

supplements.name: Omega-3 (Minyak Ikan)
supplements.shortDescription: Kesehatan jantung, otak, dan sangat anti-inflamasi.

timing.reason: Dengan makanan berat berlemak untuk penyerapan optimal.

synergyReasons.vitamin_d3: Keduanya larut lemak dan berbagi jalur penyerapan — D3 + Omega-3 adalah tumpukan dasar inti.
synergyReasons.curcumin: Keduanya mengurangi peradangan melalui jalur komplementer (EPA/DHA melalui eicosanoid; kurkumin melalui NF-κB).

interactionReasons.iron: Ion besi bebas mengkatalisis peroksidasi lipid EPA dan DHA, menurunkan kualitas dan kapasitas antioksidan suplemen omega-3. Konsumsi besi dan minyak ikan pada waktu yang berbeda untuk menjaga integritas omega-3. (Siddiqui RA, Prostaglandins Leukot Essent Fatty Acids 2004)

supplements.notes: Look for at least 500 mg combined EPA+DHA per capsule. Triglyceride form is significantly better absorbed than ethyl ester. Third-party tested for oxidation and heavy metals (IFOS certified).

supplements.name: Jamur Lion's Mane
supplements.shortDescription: Mendukung faktor pertumbuhan saraf (NGF), plastisitas, dan ingatan.

timing.reason: Pagi hari untuk dukungan siang hari.

synergyReasons.omega3: Keduanya mendukung neuroplastisitas dan kesehatan otak melalui mekanisme yang berbeda (NGF vs. dukungan membran DHA).
synergyReasons.alpha_gpc: Alpha-GPC menyediakan dukungan prekursor asetilkolin sementara Lion's Mane meningkatkan NGF — tumpukan otak yang saling melengkapi.

supplements.commonDoses: 500–3,000 mg daily (fruiting body extract standardized for beta-glucans)
supplements.notes: Use fruiting body extracts, not mycelium-on-grain products — the latter have low active compound content. Effects typically noticed after 4–8 weeks of consistent use.
sources: Lai PL, Int J Med Mushrooms 2013

supplements.name: Alpha-GPC
supplements.shortDescription: Penambah asetilkolin untuk memori dan hubungan pikiran-otot yang kuat.

timing.reason: 30-60 menit sebelum tantangan kognitif/fisik.

synergyReasons.lions_mane: Lion's Mane meningkatkan NGF sementara Alpha-GPC meningkatkan asetilkolin — dukungan kognitif yang saling melengkapi.
synergyReasons.l_theanine: L-theanine menghaluskan stimulasi kognitif berlebih dan mendorong perhatian yang tenang dan terfokus.

supplements.notes: One of the most bioavailable choline sources. Can cause headaches if total choline intake is already very high. Shown to support growth hormone release in acute studies.
sources: Bellar D, J Int Soc Sports Nutr 2015

supplements.name: L-Teanin
supplements.shortDescription: Asam amino dari teh hijau yang meningkatkan fokus tenang.

timing.reason: Sangat baik bila dikombinasikan dengan kafein untuk mencegah gelisah.

synergyReasons.caffeine: L-theanine mengurangi kecemasan dan kegelisahan akibat kafein sambil mempertahankan efek peningkatan fokus. Rasio 2:1 (200 mg theanine : 100 mg kafein) telah banyak diteliti.
synergyReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Keduanya mendorong keadaan tenang dan rileks melalui jalur yang berbeda (modulasi GABA vs. aktivitas reseptor NMDA).

supplements.notes: Very safe with no known serious adverse effects. Naturally found in green and black tea (~20–50 mg per cup). Can be used at higher doses (200–400 mg) for sleep support.
sources: Nobre AC, Asia Pac J Clin Nutr 2008

supplements.name: Kafein
supplements.shortDescription: Stimulan populer untuk energi dan menekan rasa kantuk.

timing.reason: Pagi hari atau sebelum berolahraga.

synergyReasons.l_theanine: L-theanine secara signifikan mengurangi kecemasan dan kegelisahan akibat kafein sambil mempertahankan manfaat fokus dan kinerjanya.

interactionReasons.melatonin: Kafein memblokir reseptor adenosin dan bertindak sebagai stimulan, secara langsung melawan efek melatonin yang meningkatkan kualitas tidur. Hindari kafein dalam waktu 6–8 jam setelah mengonsumsi melatonin.
interactionReasons.vitamin_b1: Kafein menghambat protein transporter intestinal tiamin (B1) (ThTr1/ThTr2) dan meningkatkan ekskresi tiamin urin. Asupan kafein tinggi secara teratur dapat berkontribusi pada penipisan tiamin marginal dari waktu ke waktu. Pisahkan suplementasi tiamin dari kafein setidaknya 1 jam. (Stein J, Am J Physiol 1987; Said HM, Am J Physiol 1999)

supplements.commonDoses: 100–200 mg per dose; limit to 400 mg/day total
supplements.notes: Tolerance develops rapidly with daily use. Cycling off periodically helps maintain effectiveness. Adenosine receptor antagonist — works by blocking sleep-promoting adenosine. Half-life: ~5–6 hours.

supplements.name: Ashwagandha
supplements.shortDescription: Herba adaptogen untuk menekan stres dan menurunkan kortisol.

timing.reason: Penggunaan malam hari sering disukai untuk manfaat relaksasi.

synergyReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Keduanya mengurangi respons stres sumbu HPA dan mendukung kualitas tidur melalui mekanisme yang saling melengkapi.
synergyReasons.l_theanine: Bersama-sama membentuk tumpukan anti-stres dan pro-relaksasi yang komprehensif.

interactionReasons.berberine: Baik ashwagandha maupun berberine secara independen menurunkan kadar glukosa darah. Kombinasinya dapat menghasilkan efek hipoglikemik aditif yang mungkin berlebihan pada individu dengan diabetes atau mereka yang mengonsumsi obat gula darah. Pantau kadar glukosa dengan cermat jika dikombinasikan. (Chandrasekhar K, Indian J Psychol Med 2012; Yin J, Metabolism 2008)
interactionReasons.levothyroxine: Ashwagandha dapat secara alami meningkatkan kadar T3 dan T4. Menggabungkan dengan obat tiroid seperti levotiroksin dapat menimbulkan risiko efek seperti hipertiroidisme.

supplements.commonDoses: 300–600 mg daily (KSM-66 or Sensoril standardized extract)
supplements.notes: KSM-66 (root extract) and Sensoril (root+leaf) are the most clinically studied forms. Effects build over 4–8 weeks. Avoid during pregnancy. May interact with thyroid medications.
sources: Chandrasekhar K, Indian J Psychol Med 2012

supplements.name: Magnesium Treonat
supplements.shortDescription: Satu-satunya magnesium yang melewati sawar darah-otak.

timing.reason: Malam hari untuk memori.

synergyReasons.apigenin: Apigenin + Magnesium L-Threonat adalah tumpukan tidur yang banyak dirujuk (protokol Huberman Lab).
synergyReasons.l_glycine: Keduanya mendorong tidur yang dalam dan memulihkan melalui mekanisme yang saling melengkapi (kadar Mg otak vs. pengurangan suhu tubuh inti).

interactionReasons.iron: Magnesium (segala bentuk) bersaing dengan besi pada pengangkut logam divalen usus. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam. (NIH ODS; Minihane AM, Br J Nutr 1998)
interactionReasons.calcium: Kalsium dan magnesium bersaing untuk transporter usus. Pemberian bersama dosis tinggi mengurangi penyerapan keduanya. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam. (Seelig MS, JAMA 1975)

supplements.notes: More expensive than other magnesium forms. Primarily for cognitive and sleep benefits rather than general magnesium repletion. Animal data is strong; human sleep data emerging. If combining with other magnesium forms for deficiency, space doses by at least 6 hours.

supplements.name: Melatonin
supplements.shortDescription: Hormon tidur. Sangat efektif untuk jet lag.

timing.reason: 30-60 menit sebelum tidur di kamar yang gelap.

synergyReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Magnesium mendukung relaksasi fisiologis dan sinyal GABA yang diperlukan agar melatonin bekerja secara efektif.
synergyReasons.l_glycine: L-glisin menurunkan suhu tubuh inti dan meningkatkan arsitektur tidur — melengkapi sinyal sirkadian melatonin.

interactionReasons.caffeine: Kafein memblokir reseptor adenosin dan bertindak sebagai stimulan, secara langsung melawan efek melatonin yang meningkatkan kualitas tidur. Hindari kafein dalam waktu 6–8 jam setelah mengonsumsi melatonin.

supplements.commonDoses: 0.3–1 mg (physiological dose); most OTC products contain 3–10 mg (often unnecessarily high)
supplements.notes: Research consistently shows 0.3–1 mg is equally or more effective than high doses for most people. Use the lowest effective dose to avoid morning grogginess and potential suppression of endogenous production. Not recommended for long-term nightly use without medical guidance.

supplements.name: L-Glisin
supplements.shortDescription: Menurunkan suhu inti tubuh dan memfasilitasi tidur yang dalam.

timing.reason: 30-60 menit sebelum tidur.

synergyReasons.magnesium_threonate: Mekanisme tidur yang saling melengkapi — glisin menurunkan suhu tubuh perifer; Mg-threonat bekerja secara sentral pada magnesium sinaptik.
synergyReasons.apigenin: Bersama dengan melatonin dan apigenin, membentuk tumpukan tidur Huberman — beberapa mekanisme yang saling melengkapi.

interactionReasons.caffeine: Kafein adalah stimulan dan antagonis reseptor adenosin yang secara langsung menentang efek relaksasi dan peningkatan tidur dari L-Glycine. Hindari kafein dalam waktu 6 jam setelah mengonsumsi L-Glycine untuk tidur. (Bannai M, Irama Biol Tidur 2012)

supplements.notes: Very safe at recommended doses. Evidence shows improved next-day alertness and reduced daytime sleepiness in people with restricted sleep. Acts via NMDA receptor co-agonism and peripheral vasodilation.

supplements.name: GABA
supplements.shortDescription: Menenangkan otak dan mengurangi kecemasan.

timing.reason: Sebelum tidur.

synergyReasons.l_theanine: L-theanine memodulasi sinyal GABA — bersama-sama mereka mungkin memiliki efek relaksasi aditif.
synergyReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Keduanya mendukung jalur penenang GABAergik melalui mekanisme yang berbeda.

interactionReasons.caffeine: Kafein bertindak sebagai stimulan SSP dan antagonis reseptor adenosin, yang secara langsung melawan efek GABA yang menenangkan dan meningkatkan kualitas tidur. Menggabungkan keduanya meniadakan manfaat suplementasi GABA. (Boonstra E, Psikol Depan 2015)

supplements.notes: Oral GABA has limited blood-brain barrier penetration — direct CNS effects after supplementation are scientifically debated. Peripheral effects (digestive relaxation, vagal nerve stimulation) may account for reported benefits. PharmaGABA form may have slightly better data.

supplements.name: Apigenin
supplements.shortDescription: Senyawa aktif dalam kamomil.

timing.reason: Malam hari.

synergyReasons.magnesium_threonate: Bagian dari tumpukan tidur Huberman: Mg-threonat + Apigenin + L-glisin menargetkan mekanisme tidur yang berbeda.
synergyReasons.l_glycine: Bersama-sama menurunkan suhu tubuh inti dan meningkatkan aktivitas reseptor GABA-A untuk tidur yang lebih dalam.

interactionReasons.caffeine: Piperine dalam lada hitam menghambat CYP1A2 – enzim utama yang memetabolisme kafein – dan apigenin juga menghambat CYP1A2. Jika digabungkan, keduanya dapat secara signifikan meningkatkan kadar kafein dalam darah, meningkatkan risiko kecemasan, jantung berdebar, atau insomnia. Hindari kafein saat mengonsumsi apigenin. (Bhardwaj RK, J Pharmacol Exp Ada 2002; Wolfman C, Pharmacol Biochem Behav 1994)

supplements.notes: Women who are pregnant or actively trying to conceive should consult a doctor — apigenin has mild anti-estrogenic activity at high doses. Generally considered safe at 50 mg.

supplements.name: Probiotik
supplements.shortDescription: Kultur bakteri hidup untuk mendukung kesehatan dan imunitas usus.

timing.reason: 30 menit sebelum makan.

synergyReasons.prebiotics: Prebiotik adalah sumber makanan bagi bakteri probiotik — kombinasi prebiotik + probiotik (sinbiotik) secara signifikan meningkatkan kolonisasi mikrobiom.
synergyReasons.vitamin_d3: Probiotik dapat meningkatkan penyerapan dan manfaat metabolik Vitamin D.

supplements.notes: Multi-strain formulas including Lactobacillus and Bifidobacterium species are generally preferred. Refrigerated probiotics may have superior viability. Benefits are strain-specific — not all strains work for all conditions.
sources: Hill C, Nat Rev Gastroenterol Hepatol 2014

supplements.name: Prebiotik
supplements.shortDescription: Serat tumbuhan yang memberi makan bakteri usus.

timing.reason: Bersama makanan.

synergyReasons.probiotics: Prebiotik memberi makan bakteri probiotik — kombinasi prebiotik + probiotik (sinbiotik) secara signifikan mengungguli keduanya secara terpisah.

interactionReasons.iron: Serat prebiotik tipe inulin (FOS, inulin) dapat mengikat zat besi non-heme di usus melalui khelasi, sehingga mengurangi penyerapan zat besi sebesar 10–30%. Jika menambah zat besi, konsumsilah setidaknya 2 jam terpisah dari suplemen prebiotik. (Laparra JM, J Nutr 2012; Tompkins TA, J Dairy Sci 2001)

supplements.notes: Start with 2–3 g and increase gradually over 2–4 weeks — rapid introduction frequently causes bloating and flatulence. GOS (galactooligosaccharides) tends to be better tolerated than inulin.
sources: Gibson GR, Nat Rev Gastroenterol Hepatol 2017

supplements.name: Berberin
supplements.shortDescription: Sangat ampuh menstabilkan gula darah.

timing.reason: Sebelum makanan berkarbohidrat tinggi.

synergyReasons.omega3: Keduanya mendukung kesehatan metabolik dan kardiovaskular melalui mekanisme yang berbeda.
synergyReasons.curcumin: Keduanya memiliki manfaat anti-inflamasi dan metabolik dengan jalur yang saling melengkapi (AMPK vs. NF-κB).

interactionReasons.vitamin_b12: Berberine mengaktifkan AMPK dan mengurangi sekresi faktor intrinsik lambung — mekanisme yang sama dengan metformin yang mengganggu penyerapan vitamin B12. Penggunaan berberine jangka panjang dapat menguras B12; pantau kadar dan pertimbangkan suplementasi terpisah. (Hua W, Eur J Med Chem 2020; de Jager J, BMJ 2010)

supplements.notes: Berberine activates AMPK similarly to Metformin in vitro — however, direct clinical comparisons are limited and it is not FDA-approved as a drug. If you take blood sugar medications or are diabetic, consult a doctor before use as berberine can significantly lower blood glucose. May reduce absorption of certain medications via CYP3A4 inhibition.
sources: Zhang Y, J Clin Endocrinol Metab 2008

supplements.name: CoQ10
supplements.shortDescription: Kesehatan jantung dan antioksidan seluler.

timing.reason: Bersama lemak.

synergyReasons.omega3: Keduanya mendukung kesehatan kardiovaskular dan integritas membran mitokondria.
synergyReasons.resveratrol: Resveratrol mengaktifkan sirtuin sementara CoQ10 mendukung fungsi mitokondria — jalur umur panjang yang saling melengkapi.

interactionReasons.iron: Ion besi bebas dapat mengkatalisis oksidasi CoQ10 (ubiquinol → ubiquinone), sehingga mengurangi aktivitas antioksidan suplemen. Konsumsi zat besi dan CoQ10 setidaknya dengan jarak 2 jam, idealnya pada waktu makan yang berbeda. (Derek FL, Mitokondria 2007)

supplements.notes: Ubiquinol (reduced form) is better absorbed than ubiquinone, especially in people over 40. Essential consideration for those on statin medications — statins inhibit the same pathway used to synthesize CoQ10.
sources: Mortensen SA, JACC Heart Fail 2014 (Q-SYMBIO trial)

supplements.name: Resveratrol
supplements.shortDescription: Senyawa umur panjang.

timing.reason: Pagi dengan lemak (seperti minyak zaitun/yogurt).

synergyReasons.coq10: CoQ10 mendukung fungsi mitokondria; resveratrol mengaktifkan sirtuin — mekanisme umur panjang yang saling melengkapi.
synergyReasons.nmn_nr: NMN/NR meningkatkan kadar NAD+; resveratrol mengaktifkan sirtuin yang bergantung pada NAD+ — kombinasi umur panjang yang telah banyak diteliti.

interactionReasons.iron: Resveratrol mengkelat ion besi, membentuk kompleks besi-resveratrol stabil yang mengurangi penyerapan zat besi dan bioavailabilitas resveratrol. Jika menambah zat besi karena kekurangan, konsumsilah secara terpisah. (Scheers N, Nutrisi 2020; Joven J, Crit Rev Food Sci 2014)

supplements.notes: Trans-resveratrol is the bioactive form. Oral bioavailability is low due to rapid metabolism — micronized or liposomal forms improve absorption. Human longevity evidence is still emerging; most robust data is preclinical.

supplements.name: NMN / NR
supplements.shortDescription: Anti-penuaan dan energi seluler (prekursor NAD+).

timing.reason: Pagi.

synergyReasons.resveratrol: Resveratrol mengaktifkan sirtuin yang mengkonsumsi NAD+ — meningkatkan NAD+ dengan NMN/NR menyediakan substrat untuk reaksi ini.
synergyReasons.coq10: Keduanya mendukung produksi energi mitokondria dan mengurangi disfungsi mitokondria terkait usia.

interactionReasons.vitamin_b_complex: NMN dan NR dimetabolisme menjadi nikotinamid (suatu bentuk niasin/B3). Dikombinasikan dengan B-kompleks yang sudah mengandung niasin, total beban nikotinamid mungkin melebihi batas atas yang dapat ditoleransi (35 mg/hari untuk flushing), berpotensi menyebabkan flushing, peningkatan enzim hati, atau resistensi insulin pada dosis yang sangat tinggi. Pantau total asupan niasin. (Trammell SA, Nat Commun 2016; NIH ODS niasin UL)

supplements.commonDoses: 250–500 mg NMN or 300 mg NR daily
supplements.notes: Human research is promising but not yet conclusive for longevity claims — most robust data is in animal models. NMN is more expensive; NR (e.g., Tru Niagen) has more published human trials. Both raise blood NAD+ levels in human studies.

supplements.name: Kurkumin (Kunyit)
supplements.shortDescription: Anti-inflamasi super alami.

timing.reason: Dengan lemak dan lada hitam.

synergyReasons.black_pepper: Piperin menghambat glukuronidasi kurkumin, meningkatkan bioavailabilitasnya ~20 kali lipat (2.000%) — selalu gabungkan keduanya.
synergyReasons.omega3: Keduanya mengurangi peradangan melalui jalur komplementer (penghambatan NF-κB vs. modulasi eicosanoid).
synergyReasons.piperine: Piperin meningkatkan bioavailabilitas sistemik kurkumin hingga 2000%.

interactionReasons.iron: Kurkumin adalah obat pengkelat zat besi yang ampuh – ia membentuk kompleks yang tidak larut dengan zat besi di usus, sehingga secara signifikan mengurangi penyerapan zat besi. Terutama relevan bagi orang-orang dengan kekurangan zat besi atau anemia. Ambil kurkumin dan setrika dengan jarak minimal 3 jam. (Tuntipopipat S, J Nutr 2006; Jiao Y, Kimia Makanan 2009)

supplements.notes: Plain turmeric powder has very poor bioavailability. Use formulations with piperine (BioPerine), phospholipid complex (Meriva, BCM-95), or nanoparticle delivery systems.

supplements.name: Ekstrak Lada Hitam (Piperin)
supplements.shortDescription: Peningkat penyerapan suplemen lainnya.

synergyReasons.curcumin: Piperin menghambat metabolisme intestinal dan hepatik kurkumin, meningkatkan bioavailabilitas ~20 kali lipat — selalu gabungkan keduanya.
synergyReasons.resveratrol: Piperine juga dapat mengurangi metabolisme lintas pertama resveratrol, sehingga berpotensi meningkatkan penyerapannya.

interactionReasons.caffeine: Piperin secara kuat menghambat CYP1A2 — enzim hepatik utama yang bertanggung jawab untuk metabolisme kafein. Penggunaan gabungan dapat meningkatkan konsentrasi plasma kafein sebesar 50–100%, secara signifikan meningkatkan risiko efek samping terkait kafein (kecemasan, takikardia, insomnia). Gunakan dengan hati-hati saat dikombinasikan. (Bhardwaj RK, J Pharmacol Exp Ther 2002)

supplements.notes: Usually included at 5 mg in curcumin formulations. Stand-alone dosing is rarely needed. High doses (>20 mg) may affect absorption of certain medications — consult a doctor if taking prescription drugs.

supplements.name: Vitamin B Kompleks
supplements.shortDescription: Dukungan energi dan saraf yang menyeluruh.

timing.reason: Pagi saat sarapan.

synergyReasons.vitamin_b12: B kompleks menyediakan rangkaian lengkap vitamin B; B12 mandiri berguna untuk vegan atau mereka yang mengalami defisit penyerapan.
synergyReasons.folate: Semua vitamin B mendukung siklus metilasi — folat dan B12 adalah kofaktor yang paling kritis.

interactionReasons.nmn_nr: NMN dan NR dimetabolisme menjadi nikotinamid (niasin/B3). Dikombinasikan dengan B-kompleks yang sudah mengandung niasin (B3), total asupan nikotinamid mungkin melebihi tingkat aman, berisiko menyebabkan niasin flush, peningkatan enzim hati, atau gangguan kontrol glukosa pada dosis tinggi. Pantau total asupan niasin. (Trammell SA, Nat Commun 2016; NIH ODS niasin UL 35 mg/hari)

supplements.commonDoses: 1 serving daily (varies by product; follow label)
supplements.notes: Methylated forms (methylfolate, methylcobalamin) are preferred for better bioavailability. Urine may turn bright yellow from riboflavin (B2) — this is normal and harmless.

supplements.name: NAC
supplements.shortDescription: Membantu detoksifikasi hati dan pernapasan.

timing.reason: Bersama makanan.

synergyReasons.vitamin_c: Keduanya mendukung sintesis glutathion dan bertindak sebagai antioksidan yang saling melengkapi — Vitamin C dapat meregenerasi glutathion yang teroksidasi.
synergyReasons.coq10: Bersama-sama mereka memberikan perlindungan mitokondria yang komprehensif dan dukungan antioksidan.

interactionReasons.iron: NAC mengandung gugus tiol (sulfhidril) bebas yang mengkelat besi, membentuk kompleks besi-NAC di usus. Ini mengurangi bioavailabilitas besi — terutama penting bagi orang yang mengonsumsi suplemen besi untuk defisiensi. Pisahkan setidaknya 2 jam. (Haase H, Metallomics 2012; Aldini G, Free Radic Res 2018)

supplements.notes: One of the most effective glutathione precursors. Used medically for acetaminophen overdose and respiratory conditions. Note: the FDA attempted to restrict NAC as a supplement in 2020 — regulatory status may vary by region. Consult current local regulations.

supplements.name: Vitamin E
supplements.shortDescription: Antioksidan larut lemak yang baik untuk kulit.

timing.reason: Bersama makanan.

synergyReasons.vitamin_c: Vitamin C meregenerasi Vitamin E yang teroksidasi, memperpanjang aktivitas antioksidannya dalam membran sel.
synergyReasons.selenium: Selenium (sebagai glutathion peroksidase) dan Vitamin E bekerja secara sinergis untuk menetralisir peroksida lipid.
synergyReasons.omega3: Vitamin E melindungi asam lemak omega-3 dari oksidasi baik dalam suplemen maupun dalam membran sel.

interactionReasons.iron: Vitamin E dapat menghambat penyerapan besi ketika dikonsumsi bersamaan. Pisahkan setidaknya 2 jam. (Lynch SR, Am J Clin Nutr 1980)
interactionReasons.vitamin_k2: Vitamin E dosis tinggi (>300 IU/hari) secara kompetitif menghambat enzim γ-karboksilase yang bergantung pada vitamin K, mengurangi kemampuan K2 untuk mengaktifkan osteokalsin dan matriks protein Gla. Jaga dosis Vitamin E dalam jumlah sedang (<200 IU) jika mengonsumsi K2 untuk manfaat tulang atau kardiovaskular. (Booth SL, Am J Clin Nutr 2004)

supplements.notes: Choose 'mixed tocopherols' (alpha, beta, gamma, delta) over synthetic dl-alpha-tocopherol for better biological activity. High doses (>400 IU/day) may increase bleeding risk in those on anticoagulants.

supplements.name: Vitamin A
supplements.shortDescription: Penglihatan dan regenerasi sel kulit.

timing.reason: Bersama makanan.

synergyReasons.vitamin_d3: Vitamin A dan D berbagi jalur reseptor nuklir dan bekerja bersama untuk mengatur fungsi imun dan ekspresi gen.
synergyReasons.zinc: Zinc diperlukan untuk sintesis protein pengikat retinol, yang mengangkut Vitamin A dalam darah.
synergyReasons.vitamin_e: Vitamin E melindungi Vitamin A dari oksidasi di usus dan jaringan.

interactionReasons.vitamin_d3: Vitamin A (retinol, >5.000 IU/hari) dosis tinggi menghambat sinyal reseptor Vitamin D dan telah dikaitkan dengan penurunan kepadatan mineral tulang meskipun suplementasi D3 memadai. Jaga agar rasio A:D tetap seimbang — perkiraan rasio optimal kira-kira 5:1 (IU). Gunakan bentuk beta-karoten untuk mengurangi risiko ini. (Johansson S, J Bone Miner Res 2004; Cannell JJ, Ann Otol Rhinol Laryngol 2008)

supplements.commonDoses: 2,500–5,000 IU daily (retinol); up to 25,000 IU as beta-carotene
supplements.notes: Preformed Vitamin A (retinol) can accumulate and become toxic at high doses — do not exceed 10,000 IU/day long-term. Beta-carotene is converted to Vitamin A as needed and is safer. Pregnant women should avoid high-dose retinol supplementation.

supplements.name: Vitamin B6
supplements.shortDescription: Penting untuk serotonin dan neurotransmiter.

timing.reason: Pagi.

synergyReasons.magnesium_glycinate: B6 diperlukan untuk mengangkut magnesium ke dalam sel; keduanya bekerja bersama untuk mendukung tidur, suasana hati, dan sistem saraf.
synergyReasons.vitamin_b12: B6, B12, dan folat membentuk trio penurun homosistein inti — ketiganya diperlukan untuk mengubah homosistein menjadi metabolit yang aman.
synergyReasons.folate: B6 dan folat bekerja bersama dalam metabolisme satu karbon, mendukung sintesis DNA dan metilasi.

supplements.commonDoses: 10–50 mg daily (P5P form preferred for direct activity)
supplements.notes: P5P (pyridoxal-5-phosphate) is the active coenzyme form and does not require liver conversion. Doses above 100 mg/day long-term have been associated with peripheral neuropathy. Most people get adequate B6 from diet; supplementation is most beneficial for those with high protein intake or stress.

supplements.name: Biotin (Vitamin B7)
supplements.shortDescription: Rambut, kulit, dan kuku.

timing.reason: Pagi.

synergyReasons.zinc: Keduanya mendukung struktur keratin; kekurangan salah satunya menyebabkan rambut dan kuku rapuh.
synergyReasons.vitamin_b_complex: Biotin bekerja secara sinergis dengan vitamin B lainnya dalam metabolisme energi dan makronutrien.

supplements.notes: High-dose biotin (>5 mg/day) can interfere with thyroid and troponin lab tests, causing false results. Inform your doctor if supplementing biotin before blood tests. True biotin deficiency is rare but more common in those consuming raw egg whites regularly (avidin blocks biotin absorption).

supplements.name: Magnesium Sitrat
supplements.shortDescription: Magnesium ringan, juga membantu mencegah sembelit.

timing.reason: Malam.

synergyReasons.vitamin_d3: Magnesium diperlukan untuk mengaktifkan Vitamin D — tanpa magnesium yang cukup, suplementasi D3 kurang efektif.
synergyReasons.vitamin_b6: B6 memfasilitasi transportasi magnesium ke dalam sel, meningkatkan aktivitas intraselulernya.

interactionReasons.iron: Magnesium bersaing dengan zat besi untuk penyerapan pengangkut logam divalen (DMT1) di usus. Konsumsi zat besi dan magnesium setidaknya dengan jarak 2 jam, terutama ketika mengobati kekurangan zat besi. (NIH ODS; Minihane AM, Br J Nutr 1998)
interactionReasons.calcium: Kalsium dan magnesium bersaing untuk berbagi saluran penyerapan usus. Dosis tinggi keduanya mengurangi bioavailabilitas yang lain. Pisahkan minimal 2 jam. (Seelig MS, JAMA 1975; NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.zinc: Magnesium dosis tinggi (>350 mg unsur) bersaing dengan seng untuk penyerapan transporter mineral divalen. Pada dosis suplemen tertentu, efeknya kecil; ruang selama 1-2 jam jika menggunakan dosis terapeutik salah satunya. (NIH ODS)

supplements.notes: Citrate form has good bioavailability and a mild osmotic laxative effect, making it useful for those with constipation. For those prone to loose stools, magnesium glycinate or malate may be better tolerated. Count elemental magnesium (not total salt weight) when dosing. If taking multiple magnesium forms in a day, space doses by at least 6 hours.
sources: Schuchardt JP, Curr Nutr Food Sci 2017

supplements.name: Magnesium Taurate
supplements.shortDescription: Combines magnesium with taurine for cardiovascular health, blood pressure regulation, and blood sugar support.

timing.reason: Take in the evening with food — food increases magnesium absorption by up to 40% and reduces stomach discomfort.

synergyReasons.vitamin_d3: Magnesium diperlukan untuk mengaktifkan Vitamin D — tanpa magnesium yang cukup, suplementasi D3 kurang efektif.
synergyReasons.vitamin_b6: Vitamin B6 meningkatkan transportasi magnesium ke dalam sel, meningkatkan kadar magnesium intraseluler.
synergyReasons.l_theanine: Baik taurin (dalam magnesium taurat) maupun L-theanine mendukung ketenangan dan relaksasi melalui mekanisme GABAergik yang saling melengkapi.

interactionReasons.iron: Magnesium bersaing dengan besi pada pengangkut logam divalen usus (DMT1). Suplementasi zat besi minimal 2 jam. (NIH ODS; Minihane AM, Br J Nutr 1998)
interactionReasons.calcium: Kalsium dan magnesium bersaing untuk berbagi saluran penyerapan usus. Dosis tinggi keduanya mengurangi bioavailabilitas yang lain. Pisahkan minimal 2 jam. (Seelig MS, JAMA 1975; NIH ODS)

supplements.notes: The taurine component provides additional cardiovascular and neurological support. Caution: may potentiate the effects of digoxin (risk of toxicity — consult your cardiologist). Macrolide antibiotics (e.g. azithromycin, clarithromycin) should be taken at least 2 hours apart from magnesium. If taking multiple magnesium forms in a day, space doses by at least 6 hours.

supplements.name: Magnesium Oxide
supplements.shortDescription: Very low bioavailability magnesium form used primarily as a laxative, not for deficiency correction.

timing.reason: Take in the evening — primarily used for its osmotic laxative effect. Food co-administration is optional since absorption is minimal regardless.

interactionReasons.iron: Magnesium bersaing dengan besi pada pengangkut logam divalen usus. Suplementasi zat besi minimal 2 jam. (NIH ODS)
interactionReasons.calcium: Kalsium dan magnesium bersaing untuk saluran penyerapan intestinal yang sama. Pisahkan setidaknya 2 jam. (NIH ODS)

supplements.notes: Only ~4% of elemental magnesium in oxide form is absorbed — the lowest bioavailability of all magnesium salts. Not recommended for correcting magnesium deficiency. Choose glycinate, malate, or citrate instead for repletion. Oxide is only suitable as a cost-effective osmotic laxative for occasional constipation relief.
sources: Lindberg JS, J Am Coll Nutr 1990

supplements.name: Vitamin B1 (Tiamin)
supplements.shortDescription: Pengubah karbohidrat menjadi energi.

timing.reason: Pagi.

synergyReasons.vitamin_b_complex: Semua vitamin B bekerja sama dalam metabolisme energi; B1 paling efektif sebagai bagian dari B-kompleks lengkap.
synergyReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Magnesium adalah kofaktor untuk enzim yang bergantung pada tiamin — keduanya bekerja bersama dalam produksi ATP.

interactionReasons.caffeine: Kafein menghambat protein transporter intestinal tiamin (B1) (ThTr1/ThTr2) dan meningkatkan ekskresi tiamin urin. Asupan kafein tinggi secara teratur dapat berkontribusi pada penipisan tiamin marginal dari waktu ke waktu. Pisahkan suplementasi tiamin dari kafein setidaknya 1 jam. (Said HM, Am J Physiol 1999; Stein J, Am J Physiol 1987)

supplements.commonDoses: 50–100 mg daily (standard); 150–600 mg for benfotiamine (fat-soluble form)
supplements.notes: Benfotiamine is a fat-soluble synthetic derivative of B1 with superior bioavailability and is particularly studied for diabetic neuropathy and metabolic support. Thiamine deficiency is associated with alcohol overuse, restrictive diets, and bariatric surgery.
sources: Thornalley PJ, Ann N Y Acad Sci 2005

supplements.name: St. John's Wort
supplements.shortDescription: Peningkat suasana hati tradisional.
supplements.notes: Strong inducer of CYP3A4, interacting with many medications and supplements.

interactionReasons.vitamin_d3: John's Wort sangat menginduksi CYP3A4, yang dapat mempercepat metabolisme Vitamin D dan menurunkan kadar serumnya.

supplements.name: Tembaga
supplements.shortDescription: Trace mineral.
supplements.notes: Avoid taking at the same time as zinc.

interactionReasons.zinc: Dosis tinggi zinc dapat memerangkap tembaga di usus, menyebabkan defisiensi. Rasio yang seimbang diperlukan.

supplements.name: Ekstrak Teh Hijau
supplements.shortDescription: Pembakar lemak dan antioksidan.
supplements.notes: Do not take closely with iron supplements.

interactionReasons.iron: EGCG dalam teh hijau mengikat zat besi sehingga mengurangi penyerapan keduanya. Beri jarak minimal 2 jam.

timing.reason: Perut benar-benar kosong.

supplements.name: Levotiroksin (Obat Tiroid)
supplements.shortDescription: Obat untuk hipotiroidisme.
supplements.notes: Take strictly on an empty stomach away from minerals.

interactionReasons.ashwagandha: Ashwagandha dapat secara alami meningkatkan kadar T3 dan T4. Menggabungkan dengan obat tiroid dapat menimbulkan risiko efek seperti hipertiroidisme.
interactionReasons.calcium: Mineral menghalangi penyerapan levotiroksin. Pisahkan 4 jam.
interactionReasons.iron: Mineral menghalangi penyerapan levotiroksin. Pisahkan 4 jam.
interactionReasons.zinc: Mineral menghalangi penyerapan levotiroksin. Pisahkan 4 jam.
interactionReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Mineral menghalangi penyerapan levotiroksin. Pisahkan 4 jam.

supplements.name: 5-HTP (Griffonia)
supplements.shortDescription: Direct serotonin precursor that improves mood, reduces anxiety, and promotes deeper sleep without dependence.

timing.reason: Evening on an empty stomach for sleep benefits — serotonin converts to melatonin overnight.

synergyReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Magnesium is a cofactor in the enzymatic conversion of 5-HTP to serotonin, amplifying its effect.
synergyReasons.vitamin_b6: B6 (pyridoxal-5-phosphate) is essential for aromatic amino acid decarboxylase — the enzyme that converts 5-HTP to serotonin.
synergyReasons.l_theanine: L-Theanine promotes GABA-mediated calm while 5-HTP elevates serotonin — together they address both anxious and depressive components of sleep disruption.

interactionReasons.st_johns_wort: Both increase serotonin availability — combining them risks serotonin syndrome (agitation, confusion, rapid heart rate). Do not combine without medical supervision.
interactionReasons.nac: NAC increases glutathione, which can modulate serotonin metabolism. The interaction is mild but monitor for mood changes.

supplements.notes: Start with 50–100 mg to assess tolerance. Do not combine with SSRIs, SNRIs, or MAOIs without physician guidance. Short-term (8–12 week) cycles are safer than continuous use.

supplements.name: Asam Alfa-Lipoat (ALA)
supplements.shortDescription: Universal antioxidant that regenerates vitamins C and E, improves insulin sensitivity, reduces nerve damage, and chelates heavy metals.

timing.reason: Fasted absorption is significantly higher — take 30 minutes before meals for maximum bioavailability.

synergyReasons.vitamin_c: ALA directly regenerates oxidized vitamin C back to its active ascorbate form — among the most potent antioxidant recycling synergies.
synergyReasons.vitamin_e: ALA regenerates vitamin E (alpha-tocopherol) from its oxidized form, extending its protective duration.
synergyReasons.coq10: Both support mitochondrial energy production and membrane protection — synergistic against mitochondrial dysfunction.
synergyReasons.nac: NAC raises glutathione while ALA both recycles glutathione and independently scavenges free radicals — comprehensive antioxidant defense.
synergyReasons.vitamin_b1: ALA functions as a cofactor with thiamine (B1) in the pyruvate dehydrogenase complex, making them metabolically interdependent.

supplements.commonDoses: 200–600 mg daily (R-ALA preferred over racemic ALA)
supplements.notes: R-ALA is the biologically active form with 3–5x better potency. Na-R-ALA (sodium salt) is stabilized and more bioavailable. ALA mildly lowers blood sugar — diabetics should monitor glucose closely.

supplements.name: Astaxanthin
supplements.shortDescription: Marine carotenoid 6,000x more potent than vitamin C as an antioxidant — protects skin, eyes, muscles, and mitochondria from oxidative damage.

timing.reason: Fat-soluble carotenoid — bioavailability increases 3-7x when taken with fat-containing food.

synergyReasons.vitamin_c: Vitamin C works in aqueous environments while astaxanthin protects lipid membranes — together they provide complete cellular antioxidant coverage.
synergyReasons.vitamin_e: Both are lipid-soluble antioxidants that protect cell membranes — astaxanthin spans the entire membrane bilayer while vitamin E protects only the outer layer.
synergyReasons.omega3: Omega-3 fatty acids increase the risk of lipid peroxidation; astaxanthin specifically protects polyunsaturated fatty acids from oxidation — a natural pairing.
synergyReasons.coq10: Both protect mitochondrial membranes and support energy production — synergistic mitochondrial antioxidant coverage.

supplements.notes: Most concentrated natural source is Haematococcus pluvialis microalgae. Skin benefits (UV protection, elasticity) appear at 4 mg/day after 4–8 weeks. Unlike beta-carotene, no toxicity concern at standard doses.

supplements.name: Bacopa Monnieri
supplements.shortDescription: Ayurvedic herb that enhances memory formation, speeds information processing, and reduces anxiety through neurotrophic and antioxidant mechanisms.

timing.reason: Always take with fat-containing food — bacosides are fat-soluble and bioavailability drops sharply without dietary fat.

synergyReasons.lions_mane: Lion's Mane promotes NGF (nerve growth) while Bacopa enhances synaptic communication and memory encoding — complementary neuroplasticity stack.
synergyReasons.alpha_gpc: Alpha-GPC boosts acetylcholine synthesis while Bacopa inhibits acetylcholinesterase (slows breakdown) — synergistic cholinergic enhancement.
synergyReasons.ginkgo_biloba: Ginkgo improves cerebral blood flow while Bacopa enhances memory consolidation — addressing delivery and processing together.
synergyReasons.omega3: DHA in omega-3 supports neuronal membrane fluidity while Bacopa's bacosides enhance synaptic plasticity.

supplements.notes: Requires 8–12 weeks of consistent use for full memory benefits — unlike stimulants, effects build gradually. May cause GI upset if taken without food. Most studied at 300 mg of the KM Syriva KeenMind/Naturex extract.
sources: Calabrese C, J Altern Complement Med 2008

supplements.name: BCAA (Asam Amino Rantai Cabang)
supplements.shortDescription: Leucine, isoleucine, and valine — essential amino acids that prevent muscle breakdown, stimulate muscle protein synthesis, and reduce exercise fatigue.

timing.reason: Take 30 minutes before or during exercise — BCAAs are directly oxidized in muscle tissue during exercise.

synergyReasons.creatine: Creatine increases ATP availability for muscle contraction while BCAAs provide the leucine signal for muscle protein synthesis — foundational performance duo.
synergyReasons.glutamine: Glutamine supports gut integrity and immune function during training while BCAAs fuel muscle — addressing different recovery needs simultaneously.
synergyReasons.electrolytes: BCAAs reduce muscle fatigue while electrolytes maintain neuromuscular signaling — together they support exercise performance and hydration.
synergyReasons.vitamin_b6: B6 (PLP) is the essential cofactor for BCAA aminotransferase enzymes — required for the metabolism of all three BCAAs.

supplements.notes: If you eat sufficient protein (1.6–2.2 g/kg body weight), additional BCAAs provide limited benefit. Most valuable for fasted training, caloric restriction, or plant-based athletes. Leucine (>2.5 g per dose) is the key muscle-protein-synthesis trigger.

supplements.name: Cordyceps (CS-4)
supplements.shortDescription: Medicinal fungus that boosts ATP synthesis, increases VO₂ max, improves oxygen utilization, and reduces fatigue in both athletes and older adults.

timing.reason: Morning to leverage its energizing, performance-enhancing effects throughout the day; preferably before exercise.

synergyReasons.reishi: Complementary functional mushrooms: Cordyceps provides daytime energy and athletic performance while Reishi supports evening recovery and immunity.
synergyReasons.lions_mane: Lion's Mane supports cognitive function while Cordyceps improves physical energy and oxygen efficiency — mind and body performance stack.
synergyReasons.coq10: Both enhance mitochondrial ATP production through different mechanisms — CoQ10 via electron transport chain, Cordyceps via adenosine and ATP precursors.
synergyReasons.l_carnitine: Carnitine transports fatty acids into mitochondria while Cordyceps boosts ATP synthesis capacity — synergistic energy metabolism support.

supplements.notes: CS-4 (Paecilomyces hepiali) is the extensively studied pharmaceutical strain. Fruiting body products are also available. Improves VO₂ max in older adults in 6-week trials. Safe for daily long-term use.
sources: Chen S, J Altern Complement Med 2010

supplements.name: Enzim Pencernaan
supplements.shortDescription: Blend of enzymes (protease, lipase, amylase, lactase) that improves macronutrient digestion, reduces bloating, and enhances nutrient absorption.

timing.reason: Must be taken immediately before or at the start of each meal — enzymes need to mix with food in the stomach.

synergyReasons.probiotics: Digestive enzymes break down food for microbiome fermentation; probiotics maintain the microbial environment that produces some endogenous enzymes — complementary digestive support.
synergyReasons.prebiotics: Enzymes improve digestion of the polysaccharides that prebiotics deliver to the gut microbiome, enhancing prebiotic effectiveness.
synergyReasons.collagen_peptides: Digestive enzymes improve collagen peptide digestion and absorption, making collagen supplementation more effective.
synergyReasons.zinc: Zinc is required for the production of gastric acid and endogenous digestive enzymes — addressing root causes of enzyme insufficiency.

supplements.commonDoses: 1–2 capsules per meal (look for full-spectrum blends)
supplements.notes: Most beneficial for IBS, bloating, dairy intolerance, or reduced stomach acid (common with aging, PPIs). Bromelain and papain are plant-based options. Full-spectrum blends (protease + lipase + amylase + lactase + cellulase) cover all food types.

supplements.name: Elderberry (Sambucus)
supplements.shortDescription: Anthocyanin-rich berry that reduces cold and flu severity and duration by inhibiting viral replication and boosting immune response.

timing.reason: Take with food; daily maintenance dose in the morning, higher doses at first sign of illness.

synergyReasons.vitamin_c: Vitamin C and elderberry anthocyanins provide complementary antioxidant and antiviral immune support.
synergyReasons.zinc: Zinc inhibits viral replication while elderberry prevents viral attachment to cells — dual-mechanism immune defense.
synergyReasons.vitamin_d3: Vitamin D3 modulates innate immunity while elderberry provides acute antiviral activity — together they cover both long-term and immediate immune protection.
synergyReasons.probiotics: Gut microbiome health is central to immune function; probiotics enhance elderberry's systemic immune benefits.

supplements.commonDoses: 150–300 mg extract (standardized to 25% anthocyanins) or 10–15 ml syrup daily
supplements.notes: Clinical evidence strongest for reducing flu severity and duration by 2–4 days. Raw, unripe elderberries contain cyanogenic glycosides — only use properly processed commercial preparations.
sources: Zakay-Rones Z, J Int Med Res 2004

supplements.name: Fisetin
supplements.shortDescription: Potent senolytic flavonoid found in strawberries that clears senescent cells, crosses the blood-brain barrier, and activates longevity pathways.

timing.reason: Fat-containing food dramatically improves bioavailability of this fat-soluble flavonoid.

synergyReasons.quercetin: Both are senolytics — combining them covers different cell populations and may achieve clearance at lower individual doses, reducing potential side effects.
synergyReasons.resveratrol: Resveratrol activates SIRT1/AMPK longevity pathways while fisetin clears accumulated senescent cells — structural and functional longevity synergy.
synergyReasons.vitamin_c: Vitamin C regenerates oxidized fisetin and enhances its bioavailability and duration of action.
synergyReasons.black_pepper: Piperine in black pepper inhibits fisetin's first-pass metabolism, increasing blood levels by 20–30%.

supplements.commonDoses: 100–200 mg daily continuous, or 500–1,500 mg in 2-day senolytic pulses
supplements.notes: Senolytic protocol (Kirkland et al.): 1,000–1,500 mg for 2 consecutive days/month. Most concentrated food source: strawberries (160 mcg/g). Longevity Bioscience Fisetin uses a phospholipid complex for better absorption.

supplements.name: Ginkgo Biloba
supplements.shortDescription: Ancient tree extract that improves circulation to the brain, enhances memory and processing speed, and reduces age-related cognitive decline.

timing.reason: Take with food to improve tolerability; split into 2 doses (morning/noon) for stable blood levels.

synergyReasons.alpha_gpc: Alpha-GPC increases acetylcholine synthesis while Ginkgo improves cerebral blood flow — addressing both the neurotransmitter and delivery aspects of cognition.
synergyReasons.bacopa_monnieri: Bacopa enhances memory consolidation while Ginkgo improves processing speed and circulation — complementary cognitive enhancers.
synergyReasons.omega3: Omega-3 supports neuronal membrane integrity while Ginkgo improves cerebral blood flow — synergistic for long-term brain health.
synergyReasons.vitamin_b12: B12 deficiency impairs nerve conduction; combining with Ginkgo's circulation benefits amplifies cognitive protection.

interactionReasons.vitamin_e: Both Ginkgo and high-dose Vitamin E have mild blood-thinning effects — combining may increase bleeding risk. Space them and keep Vitamin E under 200 IU.
interactionReasons.omega3: High-dose omega-3 (>3g EPA+DHA) combined with Ginkgo may have additive antiplatelet effects. Moderate doses are generally safe; caution before surgery.

supplements.commonDoses: 120–240 mg daily (standardized to 24% ginkgo flavonoids, 6% terpene lactones)
supplements.notes: Allow 4–6 weeks for cognitive effects. Avoid before surgery (antiplatelet effect). Use standardized extract (EGb 761 or LI 1370) — raw leaf teas have inconsistent dosing.

supplements.name: Ginseng Korea (Panax)
supplements.shortDescription: Royal adaptogen with 2,000 years of clinical use — enhances physical and cognitive performance, supports immunity, libido, and blood sugar control.

timing.reason: Morning on empty stomach for maximum ginsenoside absorption; avoid afternoon/evening — stimulating effect may disrupt sleep.

synergyReasons.vitamin_b_complex: B vitamins fuel the adrenal and nervous system response that Panax Ginseng modulates — synergistic for sustained energy and stress resilience.
synergyReasons.rhodiola_rosea: Both are adaptogens but with complementary mechanisms — Ginseng is tonic and immunomodulatory, Rhodiola is acutely anti-fatigue.
synergyReasons.ginkgo_biloba: Ginkgo improves cerebral circulation while Ginseng's ginsenosides enhance neurotransmitter efficiency — combined cognitive support.
synergyReasons.coq10: Both support energy production and cardiovascular function — CoQ10 at the mitochondrial level, Ginseng at the systemic/hormonal level.

supplements.notes: Panax ginseng ≠ Siberian ginseng (Eleutherococcus). Cycle 3 months on, 1 month off to prevent tolerance. KG-C (Korean Ginseng Corp) and HRG80 are well-studied, patented extracts.

supplements.name: Glukosamin Sulfat
supplements.shortDescription: Naturally occurring compound that rebuilds cartilage, reduces joint pain, and may slow osteoarthritis progression.

timing.reason: Take with a meal to reduce gastrointestinal upset and improve tolerability.

synergyReasons.msm: MSM provides sulfur needed for cartilage formation while glucosamine provides the structural building blocks — the classic joint supplement combination.
synergyReasons.omega3: Omega-3 reduces joint inflammation while glucosamine rebuilds cartilage — addressing both cause and structure.
synergyReasons.collagen_peptides: Collagen provides the matrix framework for cartilage while glucosamine supplies the proteoglycan building blocks.
synergyReasons.vitamin_c: Vitamin C is essential for collagen synthesis in cartilage and enhances glucosamine's structural repair effects.

supplements.notes: Glucosamine sulfate (not HCl) is the clinically validated form. Allow 6–8 weeks to notice joint benefits. Derived from shellfish — choose plant-based (fermented corn) if allergic.

supplements.name: L-Glutamin
supplements.shortDescription: Most abundant amino acid in the body — critical for gut barrier integrity, immune function, muscle recovery, and reducing intestinal permeability (leaky gut).

timing.reason: Morning fasted for gut barrier support; post-workout for muscle recovery. Split dosing (morning + post-workout) covers both goals.

synergyReasons.probiotics: Glutamine maintains tight junction integrity in the gut lining while probiotics maintain a healthy microbiome — comprehensive gut health protection.
synergyReasons.collagen_peptides: Both repair intestinal connective tissue — glutamine via enterocyte fuel, collagen via structural matrix proteins.
synergyReasons.zinc: Zinc is required for intestinal cell proliferation while glutamine is the primary fuel for enterocytes — essential cofactors for gut mucosal repair.
synergyReasons.vitamin_c: Vitamin C supports collagen synthesis in the gut lining while glutamine fuels the epithelial cells — synergistic mucosal healing.

supplements.notes: Conditionally essential during illness, surgery, or intense training. Most effective for leaky gut at 10–15 g/day for 4+ weeks. Post-surgery and ICU patients benefit most (standard of care in some hospitals). Unflavored powder dissolves easily in water.
sources: Kim MH, Int J Mol Sci 2017

supplements.name: Asam Hialuronat
supplements.shortDescription: Natural glycosaminoglycan that lubricates joints, hydrates skin from within, and reduces osteoarthritis pain by restoring synovial fluid.

timing.reason: Take with food for best absorption; oral HA is absorbed via intestinal HA-receptors that are more active in fed state.

synergyReasons.collagen_peptides: Collagen provides structural protein while hyaluronic acid provides hydration and lubrication — comprehensive skin and joint matrix support.
synergyReasons.vitamin_c: Vitamin C is essential for both collagen and hyaluronic acid synthesis in connective tissue.
synergyReasons.glucosamine: Glucosamine stimulates HA production in synovial cells while supplemental HA provides immediate lubrication.
synergyReasons.msm: MSM reduces inflammation while HA restores joint lubrication — addressing both symptoms and structure of joint degradation.

supplements.notes: Low molecular weight HA (< 50 kDa) has better oral bioavailability. High molecular weight HA is preferred for injectable treatments. Skin hydration effects visible in 4–8 weeks. Also improves gum health.

supplements.name: Myo-Inositol
supplements.shortDescription: Cellular messenger that improves insulin sensitivity, supports mood (PCOS, OCD, anxiety), and regulates reproductive hormones.

timing.reason: Morning on an empty stomach for consistent absorption — split dose (morning and evening) is common in PCOS protocols.

synergyReasons.vitamin_b_complex: B vitamins support inositol's role in cellular signaling and nerve function.
synergyReasons.magnesium_glycinate: Magnesium and inositol both influence GABA and serotonin pathways — complementary mood and anxiety support.
synergyReasons.folate: Folate and inositol are both critical for methylation and cell growth — important in PCOS and fertility contexts.

supplements.commonDoses: 2,000–4,000 mg daily (often in 4:1 Myo:D-Chiro ratio for PCOS)
supplements.notes: Myo-Inositol + D-Chiro-Inositol at 40:1 ratio is the evidence-based combination for PCOS and insulin resistance. High doses (12g+) may cause mild GI upset.
sources: Costantino D, Eur Rev Med Pharmacol 2009

supplements.name: L-Karnitin
supplements.shortDescription: Transports fatty acids into mitochondria for energy production; supports cardiovascular health and exercise recovery.

timing.reason: Best taken 30–60 minutes before exercise or in the morning fasted; food reduces peak plasma levels.

synergyReasons.coq10: Both support mitochondrial energy production via complementary mechanisms — carnitine shuttles fatty acids while CoQ10 powers the electron transport chain.
synergyReasons.omega3: Omega-3 fatty acids enhance carnitine's fat-oxidation effects and reduce exercise-induced inflammation.
synergyReasons.vitamin_b5: Pantothenic acid (B5) is needed for CoA synthesis, which carnitine depends on for its transport function.

interactionReasons.iron: L-Carnitine biosynthesis requires iron as a cofactor; iron deficiency reduces endogenous carnitine. Not a dangerous interaction — ensure adequate iron intake.

supplements.notes: L-Carnitine Tartrate is best for exercise performance; Acetyl-L-Carnitine (ALCAR) is preferred for cognitive benefits. Fish-heavy diets provide some dietary carnitine.

supplements.name: Akar Maca
supplements.shortDescription: Andean root that enhances libido, supports hormonal balance, improves exercise endurance, and reduces menopause symptoms without altering estrogen or testosterone levels.

timing.reason: Take with food in the morning; if taken for energy, split morning and noon dose. Avoid evening — mildly energizing.

synergyReasons.vitamin_b6: B6 supports hormonal regulation and sex hormone metabolism, complementing Maca's non-hormonal adaptogenic effects on the endocrine system.
synergyReasons.zinc: Zinc is essential for testosterone synthesis and sperm health; combined with Maca's aphrodisiac effects, they provide comprehensive male reproductive support.
synergyReasons.vitamin_d3: Vitamin D3 receptors are present in reproductive tissues; D3 and Maca have synergistic effects on libido and hormonal balance.
synergyReasons.ashwagandha: Ashwagandha reduces cortisol (indirectly raising testosterone) while Maca directly enhances libido and energy — complementary endocrine adaptogens.

supplements.commonDoses: 1,500–3,000 mg daily (Gelatinized Maca preferred for bioavailability)
supplements.notes: Gelatinized (pre-cooked) maca has better starch digestibility and higher bioavailability than raw. Yellow maca for general health/libido; Black maca for athletes and cognitive function. Effects on libido appear in 6–8 weeks.

supplements.name: Milk Thistle (Silimarin)
supplements.shortDescription: Liver-protective herb that promotes liver cell regeneration, reduces inflammation, and supports detoxification pathways.

timing.reason: Take with food to improve silymarin absorption (fat-soluble) and minimize gastrointestinal irritation.

synergyReasons.nac: NAC raises intracellular glutathione while silymarin protects liver cells from oxidative damage — powerful liver detox stack.
synergyReasons.vitamin_e: Both are antioxidants that protect liver cell membranes from lipid peroxidation — complementary hepatoprotective effects.
synergyReasons.curcumin: Curcumin reduces liver inflammation while milk thistle promotes hepatocyte regeneration — addressing different aspects of liver protection.
synergyReasons.vitamin_c: Vitamin C regenerates antioxidants used by silymarin, sustaining liver protection.

supplements.notes: Most beneficial with regular alcohol use, medication-induced liver stress, or NAFLD. Phytosome form (silymarin-phosphatidylcholine complex) has 4–10x better bioavailability.

supplements.name: MSM (Metilsulfonilmetan)
supplements.shortDescription: Organic sulfur compound that reduces joint inflammation, muscle soreness, supports collagen synthesis, and enhances antioxidant capacity.

timing.reason: Take with food to reduce GI discomfort; splitting into morning and evening doses improves tolerability.

synergyReasons.glucosamine: MSM provides sulfur for proteoglycan synthesis while glucosamine provides the backbone — the evidence-based joint supplement duo.
synergyReasons.collagen_peptides: Both contribute sulfur-containing amino acids (cysteine in collagen; MSM as sulfur source) needed for collagen cross-linking and cartilage integrity.
synergyReasons.vitamin_c: Vitamin C is essential for collagen hydroxylation while MSM provides the sulfur — together they support complete connective tissue repair.
synergyReasons.omega3: Omega-3 reduces joint inflammation while MSM inhibits pro-inflammatory signaling — addressing joint pain from both inflammatory and structural angles.

supplements.notes: Allow 4–6 weeks before assessing joint benefits. OptiMSM is the most researched and purified commercial form. Also used for skin and hair benefits via sulfur's role in keratin and collagen.

supplements.name: Fosfatidilserin
supplements.shortDescription: Key phospholipid in neuronal membranes that improves memory, reduces cortisol, and supports ADHD and age-related cognitive decline.

timing.reason: Best absorbed with fat-containing food; split into 2–3 doses with meals for stable blood levels.

synergyReasons.omega3: DHA and EPA from omega-3 are incorporated alongside phosphatidylserine in neuronal membranes — they are structurally interdependent.
